title: Fennel Caramelsweet Paleo
description: A tangy and crisp Canadian dish featuring fennel seeds, caramelize to perfection with a dash of sweetness for a hangover cure, strictly paleo-friendly.

ingredients.name: 4 oz (113g) coconut sugar
ingredients.notes: For Paleo, ensure it's refined white coconut sugar

ingredients.name: 3 large fennel bulbs
ingredients.notes: Trim the stalks, remove inner core

instructions: Melt coconut sugar and butter in a saucepan over low heat, stirring frequently to prevent burning.
Add water and bring to a boil, then reduce heat to medium-low. Add fennel bulbs along with the lemon juice and salt.
Simmer for about 20-30 minutes until fennel is soft and caramelized. Stir occasionally to keep from sticking.
Remove from heat, carefully transfer fennel to a serving dish or mold (using gloves if hot).
Let cool before serving. Enjoy as an indulgent yet healthy dessert.
